justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java 8/Jakarta EE 8 to Java 21/Jakarta EE 10, updating compiler settings, dependencies (Hibernate 5->6, JUnit 4->5, Arquillian JUnit 5), and namespace imports (javax.* -> jakarta.*). It also adopts `List.getFirst()` (Java 21) in `AuthorisationFilter.java`. However, it retains `java.util.Date` and `java.text.SimpleDateFormat` in `DateAdapter.java` and `Formation.java` instead of migrating to `java.time` APIs, and `persistence.xml` still uses `org.hibernate.jpa.HibernatePersistenceProvider` which is deprecated in Hibernate 6 (should be `org.hibernate.orm.jpa.HibernatePersistenceProvider`).
